angle: Open with a specific, researched observation, then the core problem the offer solves.
instructions: Earn the reply by being relevant, not salesy.
subjectTemplate: {{ai: a 4-6 word lowercase curiosity subject line tied to their company}}
bodyTemplate:
Hi {{firstName|there}},

{{research: one specific recent thing about their company (launch, hire, funding, press) to open with}}

Most {{title|owners}} at companies like {{company|yours}} we talk to are dealing with {{ai: one sharp pain point this offer solves, phrased as their problem}}. We help with exactly that.

Worth a quick 15-min look next week?

Alex

angle: Short friendly nudge that adds one new sentence of value.
instructions: 2-3 sentences max, threads as a reply.
bodyTemplate:
Hi {{firstName|there}},

Quick nudge on this — {{ai: one new, specific value sentence not used in the first email}}

Open to a chat?

Alex
